workLog.summary: Authored .agents/analysis/command-skill-bundling-2026-05-03.md identifying 9 bundling opportunities across 7 lifecycle commands
Ran requirements-interview skill; walked design tree (scope, user stories, data model, integrations, failure modes, security, observability)
Analyst classified change as Tier 2; CVA produced flat-registry abstraction
spec-generator wrote REQ-005, DESIGN-005, TASK-005 with 14 EARS acceptance criteria and T5-1..T5-8 sub-tasks
Analyst gap review surfaced 3 Critical and 4 Important findings; decision-critic returned REVISE; pre-mortem identified 5 additional failure modes

Folded all findings into REQ-005, DESIGN-005, TASK-005: AC-11 reframed as static contract, AC-5/8 narrowed to file-age via git log, AC-9 aligned with gh CLI CONFLICTING/UNKNOWN, T5-0 prerequisite added, BUNDLE_REGISTRY moved to shared module, CWE-78 path quoting required, 120s timeouts, reflect minimum-delta guard
Created branch docs/spec-005-command-skill-bundling and staged 4 spec files (excluded unrelated .serena/project.yml)
Committed db9f24cb: SPEC-005 analysis, REQ/DESIGN/TASK artifacts, session log, auto-generated episode (6 files, 1277 insertions)

Ran /plan: milestone-planner returned 3-milestone structure (M1 inverts T5-8 to land first); task-decomposer resolved 3 unknowns (sys.path import pattern, AC-12 parser semantics, reflect min-delta guard scope); execution-plans skill persisted plan to .agents/plans/active/

Plan pre-mortem (analyst) surfaced F1-F5; plan critic returned NEEDS_REVISION with F6-F9; folded all 9 findings into plan: Implementer Quick-Start section, M2 GREEN/RED enumeration, M1-to-M2 continuity rule, AC-13 verification stance, CI wire-up tasks, T5-4/T5-6 resized to M

Adversarial review (independent-thinker) raised C1-C6. C1 closed by user (PR #1894 is the matching bundle-via-prose precedent at the agent layer; bundle-via-prose is house style, not a workaround). C5 applied as plan-level fix (BUNDLE_CHECK_ENFORCED=0 default + xfail marks; M1 stays GREEN). C6 acknowledged as deliberate dogfooding.

User approved Q2 + Q3 spec amendments. Applied to REQ-005 (AC-1, AC-2, AC-12, AC-14 rewritten), DESIGN-005 (BundleRegistry session-init/session-end gate type to always; Presence-Marker Table runtime-conditionals only; Testing Strategy advisory framing), TASK-005 (T5-1, T5-2 drop conditional logic; T5-8 advisory WARN with BUNDLE_CHECK_ENFORCED env var gating). Q4 auto-resolved (Tier 2 holds; no system-wide CI contract). All four open questions resolved.

Promoted /context-gather slash command to .claude/skills/context-gather/SKILL.md via SkillForge orchestrator. Resolved T5-0 verification blocker (BundleRegistry references context-gather as Skill, not slash command). Old command file deleted. SkillForge validator 19/19; 17 pytest pass.
Pushed branch docs/spec-005-command-skill-bundling, refreshed marketplace counters (-1 slash command, +1 skill), opened PR #1899 (draft). Increment 1 contains 4 commits.

Ran /review on increment 1 (orchestrator-coordinated 5-axis review). Findings: I-1 (skill count 16->13), I-2 (AC traceability matrix contradicts AC-1/AC-2 prose), I-5 (model downgrade behavior change), S-1 (test subagent existence), S-2 (test trigger count + backtick). All applied. Tests grew 17->20.
